name: Reflex Plus Alutray Pate With Cod For Sterilised Cats 85g
shortDescription: Alu-tray is a nutritious wet food with high-quality animal protein and a variety of vitamins. It offers multisystemic benefits due to its functional components. With its high water content, it supports the body's daily water intake and contributes to kidney health. Additionally, it is easy to digest and highly palatable.
description: Alu-tray is a nutritious wet food with high-quality animal protein and a variety of vitamins. It offers multisystemic benefits due to its functional components. With its high water content, it supports the body's daily water intake and contributes to kidney health. Additionally, it is easy to digest and highly palatable. Ingredients: Meat and animal derivatives, Fish and fish derivatives (4% COD), Derivatives of vegetable origin (0.5% inulin), Oils and fats (0.75% Salmon oil), Minerals. Nutrient Components Crude protein 8% Fat content 5.5% Crude fibre 0.5% Crude ash 2% Moisture 82% Nutritional Supplements Functional Components: Taurine (3a370) 450 mg, L-carnitine (3a910) 115 mg, Potassium 2000 mg. Vitamins: Vitamin D3 (3a671) 75 IU, Vitamin E (3a700) 30 mg. Trace Elements: 3b605 (Zinc 15 mg), 3b503 (Manganese 6 mg), 3b405 (Copper 1 mg), 3b202 (Iodine 0.5 mg).
